title: What Makes Vistra Corp. (VST) a New Buy Stock
text: Vistra Corp. (VST) might move higher on growing optimism about its earnings prospects, which is reflected by its upgrade to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy).

title: Vistra Corp. (VST) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Vistra Corp. (NYSE:VST ) Q3 2023 Earnings Conference Call November 7, 2023 9:00 AM ET Company Participants Meagan Horn - Vice President of Investor Relations, Sustainability & Purpose Jim Burke - President & Chief Executive Officer Kris Moldovan - Executive Vice President & Chief Financial Officer Scott Hudson - President, Vistra Retail Conference Call Participants Michael Sullivan - Wolfe Research Julien Dumoulin-Smith - Bank of America David Arcaro - Morgan Stanley Angie Storozynski - Seaport Durgesh Chopra - Evercore ISI Operator Hello, and welcome to Vistra's Third Quarter 2023 Earnings Call. All participants will be in listen-only mode.

title: Vistra Reports Third Quarter 2023 Results; Initiates 2024 Guidance
text: Earnings Release Highlights Recorded third quarter 2023 Net Income of $502 million and Net Income from Ongoing Operations1 of $519 million and achieved Ongoing Operations Adjusted EBITDA1 of $1,613 million. Raised and narrowed 2023 Ongoing Operations Adjusted EBITDA and Ongoing Operations Adjusted FCFbG1 guidance ranges to $3.95 billion to $4.10 billion and $2.35 billion to $2.50 billion, respectively.

title: Vistra Corp. (VST) is on the Move, Here's Why the Trend Could be Sustainable
text: Vistra Corp. (VST) made it through our "Recent Price Strength" screen and could be a great choice for investors looking to make a profit from stocks that are currently on the move.

title: Vistra Declares Dividend on Common Stock and Series B Preferred Stock
text: IRVING, Texas , Nov. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Vistra (NYSE: VST) announced today that its board of directors has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.2130 per share of Vistra's common stock, reflecting an estimated aggregate payment of $75 million this quarter. This represents an approximately 10% increase in the company's quarterly common stock dividend per share from its fourth quarter 2022 dividend.

title: 4 Top Utility Stocks to Buy Amid Economic Uncertainties
text: Stocks from the utilities sector, like Vistra (VST), NiSource (NI), Consolidated Edison (ED) and Consolidated Water Co (CWCO), are safe bets amid the ongoing market volatility.
